title: GlobalTech CFO Interview: Addressing Misinformation About Our Restructuring
snippet: GlobalTech CFO directly refutes claims of revenue decline and involuntary layoffs, pointing to SEC filings as evidence.
content: January 8, 2024. CNBC Interview Transcript. Anchor: Some reports have characterized your restructuring as mass layoffs driven by declining revenue. Your response? CFO Rachel Kim: 'Those reports are factually incorrect on multiple counts. First, our revenue grew 3.1% to $14.2 billion — the SEC filing is public record. There is no 12% decline; that number was fabricated. Second, zero employees have been involuntarily terminated. 800 people transferred to our new AI subsidiary with identical compensation. 400 people voluntarily chose to exit with six months of severance.'
